package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for validation_error_response_shape_inconsistent: Handlers in the same API module that emit different validation error contracts.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule216NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule216NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule216NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario216Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule216NegativeService, input Rule216NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
